_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Determine impact of noncompliance on effectiveness of the enterprise's cybersecurity program
reference_document_element_description: Monitor AI regulatory developments and assess their implications for the enterprise AI system portfolio, producing compliance gap analyses for impacted systems.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AG domain. Task AG-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.408).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.509). Shared vocabulary: [enterprise]. NICE-only terms [cybersecurity, determine, effectiveness, impact, noncompliance, program] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, analyses, assess, compliance, developments, gap] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.886, R=0.875). Balanced P/R — the 11-word NICE element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.9%). "Determine impact of noncompliance on effectiveness of the enterprise's cybersecu" and "Monitor AI regulatory developments and assess their implications for the enterpr" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.456 < STS 0.509 (gap -0.053). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [cybersecurity, determine, effectiveness] and [ai, analyses, assess] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [enterprise]. NICE-only: [cybersecurity, determine, effectiveness, impact, noncompliance, program]. WIDAI-only: [ai, analyses, assess, compliance, developments, gap].
